data.body: Closing: addressed by merged reconciler fixes on main citing bug 9b94 — 9facfabc (converge unmappable assignees to unassigned instead of churning), 83a8922f (require EXACT assignee match, never fuzzy-assign), 333f137b (resolve normalized assignee variants e.g. joe-oakhart -> Joe Oakhart), merged via PR #28 (fix/assignee-unmappable-converge). The differ no longer re-emits an assignee update every pass for non-Jira-user assignees.
